changelog: DIAGNOSTIC BUILD: Side-rail RIGHT-arrow now uses an EXPLICIT firstFocus.requestFocus() callback per current home page (belt + suspenders on top of the v1.43.94 Row+horizontalScroll fix).

Comprehensive logcat instrumentation added — run `adb logcat -s HushTVNav` on your device while you press RIGHT from the rail and you'll see exactly which page resolved, which requester was called, and whether the first card actually gained focus. Send me that output and we'll know the EXACT cause in 30 seconds.
Continue Watching home + Themes & Moods row + Tag-based release rollback all preserved from earlier builds.
